assert.//: All thresholds are 'warn' on purpose — this CI is a regression monitor, not a gate. Once we see baseline scores over a few PRs we can tighten individual categories to 'error'. Keep the thresholds honest: if we lower one to match the current reality, note why in the commit.

upload.//: Temporary public storage posts each run at a unique URL for ~7 days. Fine for PR review; swap for an LHCI server if we want historical trends.
